scenes.title: Intro Hook
scenes.voiceover: Welcome to today's market update, where we see a continued bullish trend in the market.
scenes.caption: Market Update: Bullish Trend

scenes.title: Market Summary
scenes.voiceover: The Sensex closed at 75273.45, up by 1.63%, while the Nifty 50 closed at 23306.45, up by 1.72%.
scenes.caption: Market Summary: Sensex and Nifty 50

scenes.title: Major Index Performance
scenes.voiceover: All major indices are up, with the Sensex rising by 1.63%, Nifty 50 by 1.72%, and Nifty 100 by 1.77%.
scenes.caption: Major Index Performance

scenes.title: Sector Winners
scenes.voiceover: The top-performing sectors are Realty, up by 2.69%, Metal, up by 2.56%, and Auto, up by 2.22%.
scenes.caption: Sector Winners

scenes.title: Sector Losers
scenes.voiceover: There are no sector losers today, as all sectors are performing well.
scenes.caption: Sector Losers: None

scenes.title: Race Chart
scenes.voiceover: The India VIX is at 24.64, down by 0.4%, indicating a decrease in market volatility.
scenes.caption: Race Chart: India VIX

scenes.title: Closing Summary
scenes.voiceover: In conclusion, the market continues its bullish trend, with all major indices up and no sector losers. The Sensex closed at 75273.45, and the Nifty 50 closed at 23306.45.
scenes.caption: Closing Summary: Market Update
